title: Frosted PvP
description: A 1.21 PvP Texturepack Themed Around Ice and Snow
body: Frosted is a Minecraft 1.21 PvP texturepack that has snow and ice as its theme and is aimed towards all types of PvP giving items a great new look as you can see on the new netherite and diamond sets while still keeping the vanilla feeling. It also retextures utilities items such as totems or golden apples. Keep an eye on this pack as lots of updates will come :D
